title: AEEE Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: AEEE Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham Result 2026 declared for AEEE Phase 2 B.Tech Engineering on the official website - aeee.amrita.edu on 09-05-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the AEEE result.

content.text: Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham has officially released the AEEE 2026 Phase 2 Result on May 9, 2026, for candidates who appeared in the Amrita Engineering Entrance Examination. The results have been declared for admission to B.Tech programs across various engineering disciplines including Computer Science, Electronics, Mechanical, Civil, and other branches offered at Amrita University campuses located at Amaravati, Amritapuri, Bengaluru, Chennai, Coimbatore, Faridabad, Nagercoil, and Haridwar. AEEE Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - aeee.amrita.edu.

Students can check and download their results by logging into the Amrita Online Admission Portal using their registered email ID or mobile number along with the OTP received on their registered contact details. The AEEE 2026 scorecard displays the candidate's percentile scores, ranks, marks obtained in Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, English, and Quantitative Aptitude sections, along with qualifying status for admission to engineering programs. Students are advised to verify all details on their scorecard carefully including their name, registration number, and marks, and contact Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham immediately in case of any discrepancies or errors in their result.

Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham has released the AEEE 2026 Phase 2 Result on its official admission portal for all engineering entrance test-takers on May 9, 2026. Students can access their rank cards by logging in with their registered mobile number or email ID and OTP on the official portal. The university will consider the best score obtained among Phase 1 and Phase 2 attempts while preparing the final rank list for B.Tech admissions across 8 campuses offering 19 B.Tech programmes.

rows: Registered Email ID/Mobile Number and OTP

content.text: Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham has activated the direct link to check AEEE 2026 Phase 2 Result on the official admission portal. Students can view and download their B.Tech engineering entrance exam scorecards instantly by clicking on the result link provided in the table below and entering their registered credentials. The result portal is live and accessible to all candidates who appeared for the AEEE Phase 2 examination conducted from April 24 to April 30, 2026.
Students can check their AEEE 2026 Phase 2 Result by following these simple steps on the official admission portal:

items: Visit the official AEEE result website aeee.amrita.edu/portal or click on the direct link provided above
On the homepage, locate and click on the "Result" link in the Amrita Online Application Portal (AOAP)
Enter your AEEE registered Email ID or Mobile Number in the required field
Click on "Send OTP" button to receive the one-time password on your registered contact details
Enter the OTP received on your registered email or mobile number
Click on the "Submit" or "Login" button to access your result
Your AEEE 2026 Result will be displayed on the screen with detailed scorecard information
The scorecard will show your percentile score, AEEE rank, marks obtained in each section, and qualifying status
Verify all the details including name, registration number, marks in Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, English, and Quantitative Aptitude sections
Download the AEEE 2026 scorecard by clicking on the download button
Take a printout of your result and rank card for future reference and admission counselling process
Keep the scorecard safe as it will be required during the counselling and seat allocation process
